'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=a.TrT11rlWm5ZVUWXP_zb87O2bLuXpwHWZd9FN.Nh4A-1774083234-1.0.1.1-093LfnVX.KA_mBIt8tZhfEERZ59_0ChvC27YOX4s_00"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
